{{CargoRelic
|name=The Strong
|class_id=20496
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=When Snail and Komugi released their potential, someone was inspired by their valor and made this statue. Although few people liked it, the developer still found it and bought it as a souvenir...
|fame=31
|art=15
|fth=14
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +1<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +2<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
